demographics.living_situation: lives at home, reliant on daughter for domestic tasks

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My breathing is getting worse, my belly feels tight and bloated, and my legs are blown up like balloons.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Worsening breathlessness over weeks with new bloating and badly swollen legs, on top of long-standing lung disease, prompted the family to seek urgent advice.

symptom_narrative.onset: a gradual worsening over the past three weeks
symptom_narrative.duration: about three weeks of steadily worsening breathlessness, with the swelling and bloating building over that time
symptom_narrative.character: breathlessness on the slightest exertion, a tight bloated belly, and heavy, hugely swollen legs; a dull ache in the upper right side of the belly
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: breathing is much worse than usual and he is now barely able to move around the house
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: breathing trouble in the chest, bloating and a dull ache in the upper right belly, and swelling in both legs up the thighs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse with any exertion; the swelling and bloating have been steadily increasing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting; using oxygen helps his breathing when he wears it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any exertion or moving around; not using his oxygen
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: heavy swollen legs and a bloated, achy belly; denies fever, denies coughing up discoloured phlegm, denies sharp chest pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: has had breathing trouble for years with his lung condition but the swelling and bloating are new and worse than before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: housebound, mobility severely limited, relies on his daughter for most tasks

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a long-standing serious lung condition (COPD) for about 10 years
past_medical_history.how_managed: uses puffers/inhalers and has a home oxygen machine, though he admits he doesn't always use the oxygen

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home with support from his daughter for domestic tasks; housebound with severely limited mobility

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: used to chronic breathlessness so may downplay how much worse things are; reliant on daughter who is worried

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, breathless answers; daughter often relays and adds detail
